## Type
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Migration
- [ ] CI / Infra

## Testing
- [ ] All existing tests pass (`uv run pytest -q`)
- [ ] New tests added for new behaviour
- [ ] `uv run ruff check app tests` clean
- [ ] Tested locally against Supabase / Freshsales (if applicable)

## Migrations
- [ ] No new migrations
- [ ] Migration included and reviewed (non-destructive / backwards-compatible)

## Checklist
- [ ] `.env.example` updated if new env vars added
- [ ] No secrets committed
- [ ] Target branch is correct (`development` → `staging` → `main`)
